open_repo_assist_prs.title: perf/refactor: unify canBind* helpers; skip Array.filter on bindAll path

notes: PR #508 (GenerativeNestedTypesTests + canBindNestedType refactor + 8.9.0) was merged 2026-04-23. New PR branch repo-assist/perf-canBind-helpers-20260425: unify 5 canBind* helpers via canBindByVisibility; add isVisibilityBindAll shortcut to skip Array.filter in TargetTypeDefinition.Get* and TypeSymbol.Get* on bindAll path. 157/157 tests pass.
